name: fynla-dev-skills
description: Core development skills for the Fynla codebase: session management (start/end with dated handovers, design-branch auto-rebase, port-aware dev server, planning-with-files fallback), Obsidian vault sync (transcript capture, orphan detection, standards audit) and vault context retrieval, systematic debugging, feature scaffolding, tech debt auditing (session + codebase-wide), deployment notes (prod + dev SiteGround), shipping (commit/push/PR), cost estimation, skill creation, PRD writing, evaluation review, and security hardening.
